title: carex vesicaria var. friesii
intro: Carex vesicaria var. friesii, also known as Fries' bladder sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating kidney and bladder issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Fries' bladder sedge is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
